description.content: Manage blueprint schemas that define the structure and attributes of catalog entities such as services, teams, and resources.
Retrieve all blueprint schemas defined in the organization's developer portal. Blueprints define the structure, properties, and relations for catalog entity types.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Manage catalog entity instances — the individual services, teams, deployments, and resources tracked in the software catalog.

Define and manage engineering scorecards that track adoption of standards and production readiness across services.
Retrieve all scorecards defined in the organization. Scorecards evaluate services against engineering standards such as production readiness, DORA metrics, and observability requirements.

Configure developer self-service actions that automate infrastructure provisioning, service scaffolding, and deployment workflows.
Retrieve all self-service actions defined in the organization. Self-service actions enable developers to scaffold services, provision cloud resources, and trigger deployments independently.

The Rely.io Public API provides programmatic access to all features of the Rely.io Internal Developer Portal platform. Full CRUD operations are available for software catalog entities, blueprints, scorecards, self-service actions, and automations. Every action available through the Rely.io web interface can also be performed via this REST API. Authentication uses a long-lived API key (Bearer token) generated in the Rely.io Plugins settings page.

Contact Support:
 Name: Rely.io Support
